name: Portfolio Strip Gallery
description: Horizontal scroll-snap strip of 3:4 portrait cards. Hover surfaces a meta panel with title and subtitle; static labels stay visible below for clarity. Desktop adds prev/next chevron controls.

descriptions.descriptive: Cards size to roughly one-and-a-quarter visible per breakpoint so the next card always peeks in from the right, signalling the strip continues. Each card is a 3:4 portrait with an optional discipline chip top-left and a hover-revealed meta panel pinned to the bottom inset. Static title and subtitle live below the card so the strip remains scannable without hover (mobile, screen readers). Two circular chevron controls scroll programmatically on desktop; mobile relies on native swipe with snap-mandatory.
descriptions.usage: Use as the work index on portfolio sites, agency case-study lists, photographer client galleries, and product collection roll-ups. Pairs well with a brand-statement hero and a closing CTA. Avoid pairing with another horizontal-scroll component (carousel-cards, carousel-horizontal-scroll) — the duplicate scroll affordance confuses navigation.
descriptions.audienceFit: Design studios, agencies, photographers, illustrators, and creator-led shops where the work itself is the proof of value. Suits visitors who want to skim many projects fast, then click through to a deep dive.
